member.name: M:AiVideoStudio.Api.Controllers.v1.ExportController.Create(AiVideoStudio.Api.Controllers.v1.CreateExportRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Create and queue a timeline export.

member.name: M:AiVideoStudio.Api.Controllers.v1.ExportController.Get(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get an export job by ID.

member.name: M:AiVideoStudio.Api.Controllers.v1.ExportController.List(System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: List export jobs for a project.

member.name: M:AiVideoStudio.Api.Controllers.v1.ExportController.Cancel(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Cancel a pending or active export.

member.name: M:AiVideoStudio.Api.Controllers.v1.ExportController.Retry(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retry a failed export.

member.name: M:AiVideoStudio.Api.Controllers.v1.MediaController.Upload(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.IFormFile,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Uploads a media asset for a project using multipart/form-data.

member.name: M:AiVideoStudio.Api.Controllers.v1.MediaController.GetById(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets a media asset by ID.

member.name: M:AiVideoStudio.Api.Controllers.v1.MediaController.GetProjectMedia(System.String,AiVideoStudio.Shared.ApiContracts.V1.Media.Requests.GetProjectMediaQueryRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets a paginated list of media assets for a project.

member.name: M:AiVideoStudio.Api.Controllers.v1.MediaController.Update(System.String,AiVideoStudio.Shared.ApiContracts.V1.Media.Requests.UpdateMediaRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Updates media asset metadata.

member.name: M:AiVideoStudio.Api.Controllers.v1.MediaController.Delete(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Soft deletes a media asset by ID.

member.name: M:AiVideoStudio.Api.Controllers.v1.ProjectsController.Create(AiVideoStudio.Shared.ApiContracts.V1.Projects.Requests.CreateProjectRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates a new project.

member.name: M:AiVideoStudio.Api.Controllers.v1.ProjectsController.GetById(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets a project by its unique identifier.

member.name: M:AiVideoStudio.Api.Controllers.v1.ProjectsController.GetProjects(AiVideoStudio.Shared.ApiContracts.V1.Projects.Requests.GetProjectsRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets a paginated list of projects with optional searching, sorting, and filtering.

member.name: M:AiVideoStudio.Api.Controllers.v1.ProjectsController.Update(System.String,AiVideoStudio.Shared.ApiContracts.V1.Projects.Requests.UpdateProjectRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Updates an existing project. Only Owner or Admin can update.

member.name: M:AiVideoStudio.Api.Controllers.v1.ProjectsController.Delete(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Soft-deletes a project by its unique identifier. Only Owner or Admin can delete.

member.name: M:AiVideoStudio.Api.Controllers.v1.RenderJobsController.CreateJob(AiVideoStudio.Api.Controllers.v1.CreateRenderJobRequest)
member.summary: Queue a new render job.

member.name: M:AiVideoStudio.Api.Controllers.v1.RenderJobsController.GetJobById(System.String)
member.summary: Get a render job by ID.

member.name: M:AiVideoStudio.Api.Controllers.v1.RenderJobsController.GetRenderJobs(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Boolean,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Get list of render jobs (globally, filtered).

member.name: M:AiVideoStudio.Api.Controllers.v1.RenderJobsController.GetProjectRenderJobs(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Boolean,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Get list of render jobs for a specific project.

member.name: M:AiVideoStudio.Api.Controllers.v1.RenderJobsController.CancelJob(System.String)
member.summary: Cancel a render job.

member.name: M:AiVideoStudio.Api.Controllers.v1.RenderJobsController.RetryJob(System.String)
member.summary: Retry a failed render job.

member.name: T:AiVideoStudio.Api.Controllers.v1.TimelinesController
member.summary: Timeline management endpoints — create, query, mutate and autosave timelines. Authorization: Owner of the project or an Admin role. GET endpoints are also protected — the handler verifies ownership before returning data.

member.name: M:AiVideoStudio.Api.Controllers.v1.TimelinesController.CreateTimeline(AiVideoStudio.Api.Contracts.V1.Timelines.Requests.CreateTimelineRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Create a new Timeline for a project.
member.remarks:
Each project can have at most ONE active timeline. If a timeline already exists for the given project a **409 Conflict** is returned.
Example request body: ```json { "projectId": "proj-abc123", "name": "Main Cut", "frameRate": 30.0, "resolutionWidth": 1920, "resolutionHeight": 1080 } ```

member.name: M:AiVideoStudio.Api.Controllers.v1.TimelinesController.GetTimelineById(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get a Timeline by its unique ID.
member.remarks: Authorization is enforced: only the project owner or an Admin can retrieve this timeline. Soft-deleted timelines are excluded automatically at the repository level.

member.name: M:AiVideoStudio.Api.Controllers.v1.TimelinesController.GetTimelineByProject(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get the Timeline associated with a project.
member.remarks:
Authorization is enforced for GET: only the project owner or an Admin can read this.
Example: `GET /api/v1/projects/proj-abc123/timeline`

member.name: M:AiVideoStudio.Api.Controllers.v1.TimelinesController.UpdateTimeline(System.String,AiVideoStudio.Api.Contracts.V1.Timelines.Requests.UpdateTimelineRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Update the name and/or settings of a Timeline.
member.remarks: Example request body: ```json { "name": "Director's Cut", "frameRate": 24.0, "resolutionWidth": 3840, "resolutionHeight": 2160 } ``` Returns **409 Conflict** if a concurrent modification was detected (OCC).

member.name: M:AiVideoStudio.Api.Controllers.v1.TimelinesController.DeleteTimeline(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Soft-delete a Timeline.
member.remarks: The timeline is not physically removed; its `deletedAt` field is set instead. Returns **204 No Content** on success (REST convention for destructive operations). Returns **409 Conflict** on OCC version mismatch.

member.name: M:AiVideoStudio.Api.Controllers.v1.TimelinesController.AddTrack(System.String,AiVideoStudio.Api.Contracts.V1.Timelines.Requests.AddTrackRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Add a new Track to a Timeline.
member.remarks: Example request body: ```json { "name": "Video Track 1", "trackType": 0 } ``` `trackType`: 0 = Video, 1 = Audio, 2 = Subtitle (enum values from `TrackType`). Returns **409 Conflict** on OCC version mismatch.

member.name: M:AiVideoStudio.Api.Controllers.v1.TimelinesController.DeleteTrack(System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Remove a Track from a Timeline.
member.remarks: A track must be empty (no clips) before it can be deleted. Returns **409 Conflict** if the track still contains clips or on OCC mismatch. Returns **204 No Content** on success.

member.name: M:AiVideoStudio.Api.Controllers.v1.TimelinesController.ReorderTrack(System.String,AiVideoStudio.Api.Contracts.V1.Timelines.Requests.ReorderTrackRequest,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Reorder a Track within a Timeline.
member.remarks: Example request body: ```json { "newOrder": 2 } ``` Pass `trackId` as a query parameter: `PUT /api/v1/timelines/{id}/tracks/reorder?trackId=track-xyz`. Returns **409 Conflict** on OCC version mismatch.

member.name: M:AiVideoStudio.Api.Controllers.v1.TimelinesController.AddClip(System.String,AiVideoStudio.Api.Contracts.V1.Timelines.Requests.AddClipRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Add a new Clip to a Track inside a Timeline.
member.remarks: Example request body: ```json { "trackId": "track-xyz", "assetId": "asset-abc", "startFrame": "00:00:00", "endFrame": "00:00:05", "name": "Opening scene", "scriptSceneId": null, "metadata": null } ``` Returns **409 Conflict** if the clip overlaps another clip on the same track (for exclusive track types) or OCC mismatch.

member.name: M:AiVideoStudio.Api.Controllers.v1.TimelinesController.UpdateClip(System.String,System.String,AiVideoStudio.Api.Contracts.V1.Timelines.Requests.UpdateClipRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Update properties of an existing Clip (name, layer, speed, trim, volume, metadata).
member.remarks: Example request body: ```json { "name": "Updated Clip Name", "layer": 0, "speed": 1.0, "trimStart": "00:00:00", "trimEnd": "00:00:00", "volume": 1.0, "metadata": null } ```

member.name: M:AiVideoStudio.Api.Controllers.v1.TimelinesController.MoveClip(System.String,System.String,AiVideoStudio.Api.Contracts.V1.Timelines.Requests.MoveClipRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Move a Clip to a different Track and/or position.
member.remarks: Example request body: ```json { "newTrackId": "track-new", "newStartFrame": "00:00:10", "newEndFrame": "00:00:15" } ``` Returns **409 Conflict** if the target track already has a clip in the specified range (for exclusive track types).

member.name: M:AiVideoStudio.Api.Controllers.v1.TimelinesController.ResizeClip(System.String,System.String,AiVideoStudio.Api.Contracts.V1.Timelines.Requests.ResizeClipRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Resize (change start/end frame) of a Clip in place.

member.name: M:AiVideoStudio.Api.Controllers.v1.TimelinesController.DeleteClip(System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Delete a Clip from a Timeline.

member.name: M:AiVideoStudio.Api.Controllers.v1.TimelinesController.AutoSaveTimeline(System.String,AiVideoStudio.Api.Contracts.V1.Timelines.Requests.AutoSaveTimelineRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Auto-save the full state of a Timeline (idempotent).
member.remarks:
This endpoint is **idempotent**: if the submitted `data` is identical to the persisted state, the version is NOT incremented and NO write is performed.
The handler compares the full serialised DTO before deciding to persist.
Example request body: ```json { "data": { "id": "timeline-001", "version": 5, "name": "Main Cut", "tracks": [] } } ``` Returns **409 Conflict** if the client's `version` does not match the server version (OCC).

member.name: M:AiVideoStudio.Api.Controllers.v1.TimelinesController.CreateErrorResponse(AiVideoStudio.Shared.DomainErrors.Error)
member.summary: Maps domain errors to proper HTTP status codes. All responses use ApiResponse<T> — no raw strings or untyped IActionResult. No exception swallowing here; only domain-level Result failures are handled.

member.name: M:AiVideoStudio.Api.Controllers.v1.WorkflowController.Create(AiVideoStudio.Api.Controllers.v1.CreateWorkflowRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Create a validated DAG workflow for a project.

member.name: M:AiVideoStudio.Api.Controllers.v1.WorkflowController.Get(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get a workflow and all step states.

member.name: M:AiVideoStudio.Api.Controllers.v1.WorkflowController.List(System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: List project workflows using stable pagination.

member.name: M:AiVideoStudio.Api.Controllers.v1.WorkflowController.Run(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Queue a ready workflow for background execution.

member.name: M:AiVideoStudio.Api.Controllers.v1.WorkflowController.Cancel(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Cancel queued or active execution.

member.name: M:AiVideoStudio.Api.Controllers.v1.WorkflowController.Retry(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Reset and queue a failed workflow.

member.name: M:AiVideoStudio.Api.Controllers.v1.WorkflowController.Pause(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Pause an active workflow at a step boundary.

member.name: M:AiVideoStudio.Api.Controllers.v1.WorkflowController.Resume(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Resume a paused workflow.

member.name: M:AiVideoStudio.Api.Controllers.v1.WorkflowController.Update(System.String,AiVideoStudio.Api.Controllers.v1.UpdateWorkflowRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Replace workflow metadata and DAG while it is not running.

member.name: M:AiVideoStudio.Api.Controllers.v1.WorkflowController.Delete(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Soft-delete a workflow that is not running.

member.name: M:AiVideoStudio.Api.Controllers.v1.WorkflowController.Execution(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get the most recent workflow execution.
